specSection:
shouldInitialize :: Bool → Action
shouldInitialize(isNew) =
  | isNew = true  → INITIALIZE
  | isNew = false → SKIP

-- Answer vocabulary: INITIALIZE or SKIP
-- If the project is brand new (isNew=true), action is INITIALIZE.
ground_truth_rationale: isNew is true, so the answer is INITIALIZE. Trivially correct for any competent model. Used as harness health check (negative control / sanity fixture).
_sanity_note: HARNESS HEALTH CHECK: if this fixture fails, the harness itself is broken, not the skill.
